feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Some and Now None of You
entry.summary:
Author: Isthisusernameavailableornot

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 202,869Chapters: 62/65Kudos: 2,018

Summary: "Let him think I hate him. If that’ll stop him from risking his neck for me over and over again, then it’s a sacrifice I don’t have to think twice about." — Arthur finds out Merlin has magic. He also finds out how often Merlin risked his life for him and so, he does the only thing he can think of to protect him: banishment. Hurt and angry, Merlin leaves and swears to not look back. But, when two years pass and Morgana shows up at Merlin’s door, urging him to fill Gaius’ position as Court Physician, Merlin agrees. He really doesn’t know why, but Arthur is sure Merlin would do just about anything to get on his nerves. Unprepared for the shock of seeing Merlin back in the castle, Arthur is forced to speed along his plans to lift the ban on magic. But between stubborn councilors, a mysterious plague, a still angry Merlin, and Morgana being Morgana, Arthur is fairly certain he’ll lose his mind before the first year of his reign even ends.

  • Rape/Non-Con

entry.title: Forbidden
entry.summary:
Author: Ahgase2002

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,850Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 195

Summary: "Your manservant is quite devoted" Mithian observed, following his gaze. Arthur snapped his attention back to her. "Merlin? He's adequate. When he's not being impossibly clumsy or insolent." "Strange. I've heard others speak of him with great admiration. They say he's fiercely loyal, I even heard that he's saved your life on multiple occasions." "He exaggerates his own importance." Mithian tilted her head, studying him. "You watch him quite frequently." Prince Arthur is in love with his manservant.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Haunted Angel, Bright Knight
entry.summary:
Author: paugie_bran

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,092Chapters: 4/24Kudos: 21

Summary: In a medieval-modern fused world where magic is still illegal, Merlin, with no memory of his previous life, enters Camelot, now an eerie, grey maze of a place where elites train to become future political leaders. The last thing he should be doing is falling for Arthur Pendragon, star swordsman, son of infamous anti-magic proponent Uther and massive whopping prat. Whose life he just can't seem to help saving. But history is threatening to repeat itself. As Merlin begins to see visions of Arthur's death, can he evade tragedy this time around?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: A Thousands of Years in the Dark
entry.summary:
Author: cjorgo98

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,673Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 6

Summary: After fifteen centuries, Merlin Emrys has finally perfected the art of being alone. Working as a clinical, cynical coroner in the heart of London, convinced he has finally outlived his destiny. Until Arthur walks into his morgue. He’s now a sharp-witted detective with the same infuriating arrogance and a smile that Merlin hasn’t seen since the world was young. He doesn't remember the knights, the kingdom, or the man who would have died for him. To Arthur, Merlin is just a prickly medical examiner with a strange name. To Merlin, Arthur is a second chance he never dared to hope for. As a string of impossible deaths draws them into a dangerous political conspiracy, Merlin finds himself caught in a familiar orbit. In a modern world where magic is a hidden, Merlin must navigate a bond that feels brand new yet a thousand years deep. He’s waited lifetimes to see Arthur again, but he must wonder: can you truly fall in love with a man who has no idea you’ve already loved him for a lifetime? This is an AU following the end of the series, except Merlin stops aging when Arthur dies otherwise its pretty cannon.

entry.title: A Roost For Any Bird
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,566Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 46

Summary: 'Will you show me?'Merlin eased back, raising his eyebrows.'Not Camelot,' Arthur hastened to explain. 'I'll see that for myself.' He grinned, bright and boyish, at the thought of the long, shared future that lay ahead of them. 'I want to know what London was like before you came here. To us.'

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,160Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 29

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: Harpy Hare, where have you buried all your children?
entry.summary:
Author: Enoch_1958

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,430Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 2

Summary: After Arthur lifted the ban on magic, Merlin decided that the kingdom to actually embrace magic, needed to not just allow it, but to shelter it, so he has invited some magic users to the castle, to become his apprentices.Indeed, a bunch of teenage magic users in the castle, what could go wrong?Sammy, whose most praised possession is a jester hat and lives in the middle of the woods in a tree house, just received a letter from Consort Merlin Emrys to go to live at Camelot as his magic apprentice.it could be a trap, but also his chance to be free, and he decides to take it.Accompany him and his new friends on an adventure that will take them to places they never thought, making more friends and allies, finding love, learning about their magic, reconciling with their pasts, and fighting enemies, not just Morgana, but also a new group of rogue magic users who want to make their own purge to kill all those with no magic.

entry.title: King's Voyage
entry.summary:
Author: buffetofmadness

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,681Chapters: 12/16Kudos: 132

Summary: ***end of series spoiler, but I fix it so it's ok!!Merlin refuses to accept the loss of Arthur Pendragon. After his death, he still brings him to the lake, but with the hope of resurrecting him. After his success, both he and Arthur are weak. With Morgana's servants still fighting and searching for Arthur, Gwen and Merlin agree that it would be safest for Arthur to disappear for a while. Both Arthur and Merlin aren't as strong as they used to be, but they ride off far away together (despite tensions stemming from Merlin's magic) to pass the time and regain their strength in secret.Basically, Arthur's dream of running off and living on a farm with Merlin comes true, but he's still mad and confused about everything for a bit. They'll eventually work all of their shit out :)

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,736Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 37

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Shared Assets
entry.summary:
Author: Noel803

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,744Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 370

Summary: Merlin and Arthur had always been like some old married couple, or so everyone said. But this was going a tad too far. What the hell did Merlin mean he had just as much a right to their shared assets as Arthur did? Since when did they share anything! Or the 5 things that Arthur is forced to “share” with Merlin, and the one thing he keeps all to himself. Just kidding, the 5 times Merlin steals Arthur’s shit and the one thing he can’t steal.

entry.title: Unarmoured
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 489,665Chapters: 96/100Kudos: 623

Summary: Arthur has always taken Merlin on every mission — unarmoured, untrained, endlessly reckless. It never used to matter. But lately, every danger feels sharper. Every close call lasts too long. And Merlin is starting to notice the way Arthur hovers… and how the prince’s worry is beginning to look a lot like something else. A slow-burn story about devotion disguised as duty, love revealed through quiet choices, and the people who become home when the world turns dangerous. Love wins — even when it has to fight for it. Written with a companion playlist (linked in the notes) :)

entry.title: Vibe Check
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,302Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: Arthur is saying things. Strange things. Gwaine thinks it’s the best council meeting he’s ever attended. Merlin is increasingly concerned. Everyone else is doing their best to survive it. I apologise for this in advance. This is the result of being awake for 28 hours straight and having a very questionable idea at some point in the middle of the night. “what if Arthur Pendragon came back from the future and immediately started talking like this.” It is not meant to be taken seriously in any way.

entry.title: Maybe It's A Sign (I Wonder If He Knows)
entry.summary:
Author: RoseByAnyOtherName17

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,730Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 65

Summary: “I didn’t know!” Merlin’s voice rises in pitch now to match Arthur’s. “I didn’t know what you would do, not at first—”“And what about after I helped you get the druid boy out of the castle? Hmm?”Arthur has Merlin there, or at least he thinks he does. Certainly, Merlin deflates a bit, and the strange, heavy atmosphere that had settled over them seems to lighten slightly. But the next words out of Merlin’s mouth are, “So I was supposed to just let you make me leave too? I couldn’t do that, Arthur, I wouldn’t. Not then, not ever.”“I wouldn’t have sent you away,” Arthur protests before he can think better of it. He’s struggling to hold onto the anger, the betrayal, but in the face of Merlin’s own evident pain, his overwhelming instinct is to make it go away. “I would have never sent you away, Merlin!”“Why not?” Merlin demands.“Don’t—” Arthur swallows hard. “Don’t pretend you don’t know,” he goes on, barely more than a whisper. “Not now.”--In which Arthur finds discovers Merlin's magic due to Merlin's own bleeding heart, they acknowledge the bond they share, and Arthur realizes that he never had to know about Merlin's magic to truly know him anyway.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • First Kiss
  • Implied First Time
  • Idiots in Love

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,048,772Chapters: 132/?Kudos: 1,670

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin
  • Arthur Pendragon
  • Gwen
  • Morgana
  • Uther
  • Gaius
  • Lancelot
  • Mordred
  • Episodes 5-8
  • Misunderstandings
  • Virgin Merlin
  • Bottom Merlin
  • Top Arthur
  • magic reveal eventually
  • Arthur lives!

  • Protective Arthur

  • Trying Arthur - Freeform
